title: LevelPlayer
description: The plugin allows admins to set and manage player levels, displaying them with beautiful prefixes in chat/tab.
body:
LANGUAGE SUPPORT.

- English, Russian, Ukrainian, Polski, 中文, Français, Español 

PLUGIN DESCRIPTION:
LevelPlayers is a simple and effective level system for your Minecraft server. The plugin allows admins to set and manage player levels, displaying them with beautiful prefixes in chat/tab.

PLUGIN FEATURES:
 - System of customizable levels

 - Integration with PlaceholderAPI

 - Simple control via commands

 - Fully customizable messages

 - Instant reload of the configuration

PlaceholderAPI:
- %levelplayers_level% - shows current player level

- %levelplayers_level_X% - shows the format of the specific level X

PLUGIN COMMANDS:
 - /level help - Show help menu

 - /level give <player> - Increase player level by 1

 - /level take <player> - Decrease player level by 1

 - /level <player> <level> - set player's level

 - /levelplayers reload - reload the configuration

PLAGIN RIGHTS.
 - levelplayers.set - right to set level

 - levelplayers.give - Increase level

 - levelplayers.take - Decrease level

 - levelplayers.reload - permission to reload the plugin
